entryDialogue.speaker: Narrator
entryDialogue.text: Welcome to the test fields of NyWarudo.

entryDialogue.speaker: Old Sage
entryDialogue.text: Watch your steps, traveler. Each movement consumes your vital Energy.

dialogue.speaker: Old Scholar
dialogue.text: Greetings, apprentice. I am researching the history of these ancient fields.

dialogue.speaker: Old Scholar
dialogue.text: They say that to the East, beyond the threshold, lies a colder land.
